communications.instruction: Redcap 5223, Roger, redcap 5223. sorry to hear about the landing gear issue. could you provide more information on what's happening? altitude, heading, any emergency procedures needed?.
communications.readback: I am at 8000ft and my dashboard just lit up showing that i have some hydraulic issues. Currently on decent into Subang airport. Might need to do an emergency landing at Kuala Lumpur airport, Redcap 5223.

errors.actual: I am at 8000ft and my dashboard just lit up showing that i have some hydraulic issues. Currently on decent into Subang airport. Might need to do an emergency landing at Kuala Lumpur airport, Redcap 5223.
